item.title: This Wellness Group Used People’s Deepest Insecurities Against Them
item.description: This video explores the controversial organization OneTaste and its leader, Nicole Daedone, detailing their 15-minute "M" practice and a manipulative sales funnel that drives participants into extreme debt.

media:content.media:title: This Wellness Group Used People’s Deepest Insecurities Against Them
media:content.media:description: This video explores the controversial organization OneTaste and its leader, Nicole Daedone, detailing their 15-minute "M" practice and a manipulative sales funnel that drives participants into extreme debt.

item.title: Ted Bundy's Last Words Were SO Creepy...
item.description:
Ted Bundy, executed in 1989, delivered a brief final statement moments before his execution in Florida. According to official records, he addressed his attorney and a minister, asking them to pass along a message to loved ones.
His last words were: “I’d like you to give my love to my family and friends.”
There is no verified record of threatening or disturbing final words. Accounts describing them as “creepy” are not supported by official documentation and often stem from later interpretations rather than confirmed statements.

media:content.media:title: Ted Bundy's Last Words Were SO Creepy...
media:content.media:description:
Ted Bundy, executed in 1989, delivered a brief final statement moments before his execution in Florida. According to official records, he addressed his attorney and a minister, asking them to pass along a message to loved ones.
His last words were: “I’d like you to give my love to my family and friends.”
There is no verified record of threatening or disturbing final words. Accounts describing them as “creepy” are not supported by official documentation and often stem from later interpretations rather than confirmed statements.
